kpi_data_map.name: % Confirmação de PCC
validations: confirmed_at is null or confirmed_at >= requested_at
kpi_data_map.sql_example: SELECT obra_id, atividade_id, equipe_id, DATE_TRUNC('day', requested_at) AS data, SUM(CASE WHEN confirmed_flag=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float/COUNT(*) AS pcc_confirm_rate FROM events_pcc WHERE requested_at BETWEEN :start AND :end GROUP BY 1,2,3,4;

kpi_data_map.name: % FVS Aprovadas de 1ª
kpi_data_map.sql_example: WITH base AS (SELECT obra_id, service_id AS servico_id, executor_id, DATE_TRUNC('week', inspected_at) AS semana, (status='PASS' AND COALESCE(rework_count,0)=0) AS pass_first FROM events_fvs WHERE inspected_at BETWEEN :start AND :end) SELECT obra_id, servico_id, executor_id, semana, SUM(pass_first)::float/COUNT(*) AS fvs_pass_rate FROM base GROUP BY 1,2,3,4;

kpi_data_map.name: % Lotes de Material Aprovados
kpi_data_map.sql_example: SELECT obra_id, supplier_id AS fornecedor_id, material_sku, DATE_TRUNC('week', received_at) AS semana, SUM(CASE WHEN status='APROVADO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float/COUNT(*) AS material_approval_rate FROM events_fvm WHERE received_at BETWEEN :start AND :end GROUP BY 1,2,3,4;

kpi_data_map.name: % Tarefas em FPM
kpi_data_map.sql_example: SELECT obra_id, discipline AS disciplina, workfront AS frente, DATE_TRUNC('week', updated_at) AS semana, SUM(CASE WHEN status='PARTIAL_CLOSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float/COUNT(*) AS partial_closure_share FROM tasks WHERE updated_at BETWEEN :start AND :end GROUP BY 1,2,3,4;

kpi_data_map.name: Lead Time de Execução (dias)
validations: started_at is not null and closed_at is not null
kpi_data_map.sql_example: SELECT obra_id, activity_id AS atividade_id, DATE_TRUNC('week', closed_at) AS semana_close, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - started_at))/86400.0) AS lead_time_execucao_dias FROM tasks WHERE closed_at BETWEEN :start AND :end AND started_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2,3;

kpi_data_map.name: Índice de NC em Ensaios de Materiais
kpi_data_map.sql_example: SELECT obra_id, material_sku, supplier_id AS fornecedor_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', tested_at) AS mes, SUM(CASE WHEN status='REPROVADO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float/COUNT(*) AS fvms_lab_nonconformity FROM lab_tests WHERE tested_at BETWEEN :start AND :end GROUP BY 1,2,3,4;

kpi_data_map.name: Nível de Serviço do Fornecedor (OTD & Qualidade)
validations: eta_at IS NOT NULL AND received_at IS NOT NULL
kpi_data_map.sql_example: WITH d AS (SELECT supplier_id, material_sku, DATE_TRUNC('month', received_at) AS mes, SUM(CASE WHEN received_at <= eta_at THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_deliveries, COUNT(*) AS total_deliveries FROM deliveries WHERE received_at BETWEEN :start AND :end GROUP BY 1,2,3), q AS (SELECT supplier_id, material_sku, DATE_TRUNC('month', received_at) AS mes, SUM(CASE WHEN status='REJEITADO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reprovadas, COUNT(*) AS total_quality_events FROM events_fvm WHERE received_at BETWEEN :start AND :end GROUP BY 1,2,3) SELECT COALESCE(d.supplier_id,q.supplier_id) AS fornecedor_id, COALESCE(d.material_sku,q.material_sku) AS material_sku, COALESCE(d.mes,q.mes) AS mes, (on_time_deliveries::float/NULLIF(total_deliveries,0)) AS otd, (1 - (reprovadas::float/NULLIF(total_quality_events,0))) AS qualidade, 0.5*(on_time_deliveries::float/NULLIF(total_deliveries,0)) + 0.5*(1 - (reprovadas::float/NULLIF(total_quality_events,0))) AS supplier_service_level FROM d FULL OUTER JOIN q ON d.supplier_id=q.supplier_id AND d.material_sku=q.material_sku AND d.mes=q.mes;

kpi_data_map.name: Taxa de Não Conformidades (execução)
kpi_data_map.sql_example: WITH nc AS (SELECT obra_id, service_id, DATE_TRUNC('week', created_at) AS semana, COUNT(*) AS nc_count FROM events_nc WHERE origin='FVS' AND created_at BETWEEN :start AND :end GROUP BY 1,2,3), fvs AS (SELECT obra_id, service_id, DATE_TRUNC('week', inspected_at) AS semana, COUNT(*) AS fvs_count FROM events_fvs WHERE inspected_at BETWEEN :start AND :end GROUP BY 1,2,3) SELECT COALESCE(nc.obra_id,fvs.obra_id) AS obra_id, COALESCE(nc.service_id,fvs.service_id) AS servico_id, COALESCE(nc.semana,fvs.semana) AS semana, (nc_count::float/NULLIF(fvs_count,0))*100 AS nc_por_100_fvs FROM nc FULL OUTER JOIN fvs ON nc.obra_id=fvs.obra_id AND nc.service_id=fvs.service_id AND nc.semana=fvs.semana;
